Index.title: THE POWER OF EXCELLENCE
Index.subtitle: Turkey's leading supplier of hunting and sports ammunition, and firearms since 1955.
Index.brands_subtitle: Brands representing quality and trust, produced at international standards.
Index.jet_skeet_desc: Specially developed for skeet shooting, offering precise distribution and continuous performance.
Index.jet_trap_desc: JET World Series Trap cartridge offering superior performance for clay targets.
Index.jet_desc: Equipped with optimized 28-gram stopping power, a plastic power wad, and high sealing technology for superior hunting performance.
Index.jet_export_30_desc: Equipped with optimized 30-gram stopping power, a plastic power wad, and high sealing technology.
Index.jet_export_32_desc: Equipped with optimized 32-gram stopping power, a plastic power wad, and high sealing technology.
Index.jet_export_34_desc: Maximum performance with optimized 34-gram stopping power and 16mm brass height.
Index.jet_export_36_desc: Designed for heavy conditions with the highest 36-gram stopping power and 16mm brass height.
Index.gold_horse_desc: Produced with Turkey's unique "Cartridge Sealing" technology. Perfect pressure control, delayed opening and maximum impact effect.
Index.gold_horse_skeet_desc: High quality skeet cartridge specially designed for sport shooting, offering optimized 24-gram load and 480 m/s high muzzle velocity.
Index.gold_horse_trap_desc: High quality trap cartridge specially designed for sport shooting, offering optimized 24-gram load and 480 m/s high muzzle velocity.
Index.gold_horse_28_desc: An ideal option for hunting and sport shooting with its balanced 28-gram stopping power and 480 m/s high muzzle velocity.
Index.gold_horse_32_desc: With its strong and stable 32-gram structure, it offers excellent results especially in medium and long distance hunting.
Index.gold_horse_34_desc: It offers superior performance in challenging hunting conditions with its 34-gram high impact effect and stability.
Index.gold_horse_36_desc: Provides maximum stopping power and range in the most challenging hunts with its highest 36-gram shooting power and 480 m/s muzzle velocity.
Index.miracle_desc: Miraculous results in all types of hunting with its optimized 28-gram stopping power and special wad structure.
Index.miracle_30_desc: Provides stable grouping with its optimized 30-gram stopping power and special wad structure.
Index.miracle_32_desc: With its balanced 32-gram structure, it provides high energy transfer to the target even in heavy winter conditions.
Index.miracle_34_desc: With its 34-gram high impact power, it shows superior performance in challenging hunts such as duck and goose.
Index.miracle_36_desc: Provides a stopping range in all kinds of hunting with its highest 36-gram shooting power and special wad structure.
Index.apollo_desc: The indispensable choice of classic hunters for quail hunting, with its special solutions for all terrains and high-level security.
Index.apport_desc: Our competition-oriented APPORT series guarantees the optimum speed and stability required to achieve maximum performance in sport shooting.
Index.idetech_desc: Special production ammunition providing operational superiority at global defense industry (Law Enforcement & Military) standards.
Index.idetech_less_lethal_desc: Stabilised Impact Projectiles & Baton Rounds (Plastic / Rubber Buckshot)
Index.idetech_breach_desc: Door Breaching and tactical entry munitions.
Index.idetech_cs_desc: Tear gas (CS) and tactical calibers for defense purposes (9x19mm etc.)
Index.ceoguns_desc: Highly engineered, reliable and ergonomic 12 gauge hunting and sporting shotguns production line.
Index.contact_subtitle: Find our authorized dealers in Turkey and around the world on the map.
Index.map_desc: When the project goes live, the "Find Your Nearest Dealer" feature will work here with Google Maps / Mapbox integration.
Index.corporate_subtitle: A success story built on excellence and passion since 1955.
Index.about_text: With over half a century of experience, İdeal Av is one of the most trusted names in Turkey's hunting and sporting ammunition sector. From our production headquarters in Adana, we manufacture at international standards (C.I.P), proving our strength in both local and global markets.
Index.mission_text: To provide operational superiority and reliability by producing ammunition at the highest safety and performance standards.
Index.history_text: Starting as a local initiative, we have grown into a global brand that represents Turkish engineering and quality in over 30 countries.
Index.catalog_section_subtitle: Explore our wide range of high-performance products.
Index.prof_tactical_desc: Engineered for ultimate performance in competition and defense.
Index.heritage_classic_desc: Time-honored tradition and unmatched reliability for the classic hunter.
